Unit Price: ![Calculating...](/includes/images/loadingBar.gif) [Add to Cart](javascript:__doPostBack\('ctl00$ctl00$ctl00$MainBody$MainBody$MainContent$Loader$ctl01$ctl00$AddProductToCart',''\)) * [Product Info](#a7d117df-80b1-4db7-be5b-31b1c623119e) * [Production Times](#21efae5a-fd45-4084-ac5d-e702bccbcb16) Description/Features Durable construction makes this a long-lasting option Low-profile aluminum base is available with black or silver end-caps Flip-lever telescoping pole makes setup and adjustment simple Flip-open base allows for easy banner changes Banner sold separately Product Dimensions Product Size: 33.5" W x 80.5" H x 7.75" D Product Weight: 7.25lbs ### Superb Telescoping Retractor Hardware Production Times At Banners.com, we offer flexible production time ranges for you to choose from. Because it's important for you to have ultimate control over your order, our production times range from two to five business days. This allows you to make the final decision on when you need to order. \*\*\* Orders received after 5pm CST will be processed the following business day. \*\*\* **3 Business Day Standard** This is our most popular turnaround option. Free and fast enough for most custom orders. **2 Business Day Priority** Timelines can be tight. That's why we offer this speedy option. **5 Business Day Saver** If you aren't in a hurry, you can save some money by choosing our 5 Day Saver option. Please note: the time it will take to receive your product includes the production time as well as shipping time. ## Why Choose Banners.com? **Customer Service** Our customer service is 100% in-house and comprised of friendly, professional graphic designers. **Fast Turnaround** Choose between a 1, 2, 3, or 5 day production time to complete your order on your schedule. **Quality Products** Our products are made with the finest materials available and printed using the latest technology. **Live Order Tracking** Track your order, every step of the way, with our proprietary Live Order Tracking system. × #### Search Search Term: Search ##### PRODUCTS * [Custom Banners](https://www.banners.com/vinyl-banners) * [Yard Signs](https://www.banners.com/yard-signs) * [Custom Flags](https://www.banners.com/custom-flags) * [Outdoor Banners](https://www.banners.com/outdoor-banners) * [Mesh Banners](https://www.banners.com/mesh-banners) * [Fabric Banners](https://www.banners.com/fabric-banners) * [Large Banners](https://www.banners.com/large-vinyl-banners) * [Banner Stands and Displays](https://www.banners.com/banner-stands) * [Custom Magnets](https://www.banners.com/magnets) * [Vinyl Decals](https://www.banners.com/decals) * [Canvas Banners](https://www.banners.com/canvas) * [Banner Accessories](https://www.banners.com/accessories) * [Yard Letter and Number Signs](https://www.banners.com/yard-letter-and-number-signs) * [Custom T-Shirts](https://www.banners.com/custom-t-shirts) * [Banners and Signs](https://www.ba
